name: deepseek-forge
description: Orchestrates Codex planning with DeepSeek implementation. Codex plans the work, DeepSeek generates unified diff patches, Codex reviews and applies them safely.

interface.shortDescription: Codex plans, DeepSeek codes, you review — safe patch-based code generation with automated fix loops.
interface.longDescription: DeepSeek Forge is a disciplined pipeline that turns task descriptions into reviewed, tested, and applied code patches. Codex acts as the architect and gatekeeper — it plans the work, collects context, validates patches, applies changes, runs checks, and decides whether to commit. DeepSeek is a sandboxed patch generator that receives structured prompts and returns only unified diffs. Every patch passes through multi-layer safety validation before touching the working tree. A built-in fix loop automatically retries failed patches up to 3 times by feeding failure logs back to DeepSeek.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the deepseek-forge skill to orchestrate Codex planning with DeepSeek code generation. Codex plans the work, DeepSeek generates unified diff patches, Codex reviews and applies them safely.
